description: Nostalgic Y2K/Windows XP-inspired desktop with modern functional twists. Incorporates Frutiger Aero aesthetics (gloss, bubbles, gradients) for the OS shell and RetroMSG, while utilizing a dark, tactical skeuomorphic aesthetic for MoodDeck.

rules: Use Tahoma/Verdana vibe for OS elements to evoke Web 1.0/2.0 nostalgia.
Headings should be crisp. Avoid excessive font weights; stick to 400 or 600.
MoodDeck should use small, uppercase mono-spaced or tracking-widened sans-serif fonts for hardware labels.
RetroMSG uses modern standard readable fonts for messages but retro UI fonts for menus.

visual_enhancers.frutiger_aero_glass: backdrop-filter: blur(10px); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6), 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
visual_enhancers.glossy_button: background: linear-gradient(180deg, #4a90e2 0%, #2b58a8 45%, #63a4ff 50%, #2b58a8 100%); border: 1px solid #1a3c75; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.4), 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border-radius: 8px;
visual_enhancers.mooddeck_plastic: background: #1a1a1a; border: 1px solid #000; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgba(255,255,255,0.1), 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); border-radius: 4px;

components.Taskbar: Fixed at bottom. Contains Start button on left, open app tabs in middle, system tray (clock, icons) on right. Use deep blue glossy gradient.
components.Window: Draggable container using framer-motion. Top bar has title, minimize, maximize, close buttons (red/yellow/green XP style or glossy blue). Body contains the app content.
components.Desktop Icon: Grid item on desktop. Image icon top, white text with black drop shadow below.
components.MoodDeck_Platter: Large circular div, brushed metal rings, center displays album art. Rotates when playing.
components.MoodDeck_Companion: SVG or CSS-based pixel art character. Add simple CSS animations: scaleY for breathing, translateY for head bob, and a speech bubble component.
components.RetroMSG_Bubble: Modern chat bubbles but framed within a nostalgic window. Use heavy drop shadows on the application window itself.
components.Knob: CSS circular element with a small indicator line. Requires some simple state mapping to rotation degrees.

layouts.desktop: Relative full screen container `w-screen h-screen overflow-hidden` with wallpaper background. Taskbar absolute bottom.
layouts.mood_deck: Flex or Grid layout. Left side: Platter and transport controls. Right side: Mood chips, Playlist recommend card, and Companion character at the top.
layouts.retro_msg: Flex row layout. Left sidebar (250px) for user profile, search, contacts. Right area for chat history and message input. Top row of chat area for Instagram-style stories.

motion.window_open: Scale from 0.8 to 1, opacity 0 to 1, duration 0.2s ease-out.
motion.platter_spin: animate-spin on play, paused when not playing.
motion.hover_gloss: Brightness increase or slight translateY(-1px) on glossy buttons.

wallpaper.description: Frutiger Aero abstract floating bubbles background

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a full-screen React app that simulates a desktop environment. Ensure `overflow-hidden` on the main container.
Implement the Taskbar and Start Menu. Add an authentic glossy Frutiger Aero look using CSS linear gradients.
For MoodDeck: Design a CDJ-inspired hardware interface. Dark mode, matte plastic panels, glowing orange UI elements. Build a large circular platter that spins when playing.
For MoodDeck Companion: Implement a simple CSS/SVG character with a speech bubble. Add keyframe animations for idle breathing and head-bobbing.
For RetroMSG: Implement a layout combining MSN Messenger sidebars with Instagram stories row on top of the chat area. Use a light blue/gray color scheme.
Ensure the wallpaper fills the background entirely via `object-cover` or `background-size: cover`.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for robust automated testing.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid flat, generic designs. This is a nostalgic Y2K/Frutiger Aero aesthetic combined with skeuomorphic hardware (MoodDeck).
Utilize rich CSS gradients, box-shadows, and inset shadows to create depth, gloss, and 3D effects. Do not use plain flat colors for OS shell elements.
Do not center-align the main App container globally.
Every interaction (buttons, inputs, tabs) must have a distinct hover/active state.
Never use AI assistant emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡 for icons. Use lucide-react or standard SVG paths.
Do not use complete transparent background in headers or overlays that sit on top of content.
Ensure text contrast ratios are accessible.
